category_sources: source_facts.description identifies RAxML Next Generation; official README describes RAxML-NG as a phylogenetic tree inference tool.
display_name_sources: Official README title is RAxML Next Generation and text uses RAxML-NG; source_facts.name is raxml-ng.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/amkozlov/raxml-ng, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes phylogenetic tree inference using maximum-likelihood; source_facts.executables lists raxml-ng CLI.
